items.title: Python Automation
items.summary: Kino uses Python to automate repetitive reporting tasks, extract data, process files, and improve operational workflows.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagamit si Kino ng Python para i-automate ang repetitive reporting tasks, data extraction, file processing, at workflow improvement.

items.title: Dashboard Monitoring
items.summary: Kino can create dashboard-style monitoring views for KPIs, campaign movement, digital activity, and operational performance.
items.summaryFilipino: Kaya ni Kino gumawa ng dashboard-style monitoring views para sa KPIs, campaign movement, digital activity, at operational performance.

items.title: Reporting and Data Handling
items.summary: Kino works with Excel, CSV, and XLSX reporting workflows to turn raw operational files into structured outputs.
items.summaryFilipino: Gumagamit si Kino ng Excel, CSV, at XLSX reporting workflows para gawing structured outputs ang raw operational files.

items.title: Professional Strengths
items.summary: Kino brings communication, leadership, attention to detail, adaptability, and practical process improvement into technical work.
items.summaryFilipino: Dinadala ni Kino ang communication, leadership, attention to detail, adaptability, at practical process improvement sa technical work.
